英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾
zh.St Lawrence's Churchyard, Gnosall, Staff: 英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾
zh.Gnosall, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾

zh.Of, Knightley, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾麗莉
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Knightley lV於1248年出生在英國斯塔福爾麗莉時，他的父親Robert de Knightley III28歲，母親Aline de Pantulf24歲。他於1281年與Philippa Knightley在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1327年在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾享年79歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Knightley lV于1248年出生在英国斯塔福爾麗莉时，他的父亲Robert de Knightley III28岁，母亲Aline de Pantulf24岁。他于1281年与Philippa Knightley在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1327年在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾享年79岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Knightley lV was born in 1248, in Knightley, Staffordshire, England, his father, Robert de Knightley III, was 28 and his mother, Aline de Pantulf, was 24. He married Philippa Knightley in 1281, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1327, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Knightley lV est né en 1248, à Knightley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Knightley III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Aline de Pantulf, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Knightley en 1281, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1327, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Knightley lV 1248 in Knightley, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Knightley III 28 und seine Mutter Aline de Pantulf 24. Er hat 1281 in Staffordshire, England Philippa Knightley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1327 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Knightley lV è nato il nel 1248 nel Knightley, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Knightley III, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Aline de Pantulf, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Knightley nel 1281, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1327, nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Gnosall, Staffordshire, England.

ja.Of, Knightley, Staffordshire, England: イギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアナイトリー
ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Knightley lVが1248年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアナイトリーで生まれた時，父Robert de Knightley IIIは28歳，母Aline de Pantulfは24歳であった。1281年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでPhilippa Knightleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1327年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルで79歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Knightley lV(이)가 1248년 영국 스태퍼드실르 나이틀리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Knightley III(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Aline de Pantulf(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1281년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Philippa Knightley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1327년 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Knightley lV nasceu em 1248, em Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Knightley III, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Aline de Pantulf, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Knightley em 1281, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1327, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Knightley lV родился в 1248 г. в местности нагтли, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Knightley III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline de Pantulf, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Knightley в 1281 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1327 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Knightley lV nació en 1248, en Knightley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Knightley III, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Aline de Pantulf, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Philippa Knightley en 1281, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1327, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
